title: T-050 — Sequencing v2 preview and commit overlay
prompt:
# T-050 — Sequencing v2 preview and commit overlay

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-007, §10.2, §16.2 OQ-EXT-09.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement the 07-EXT overlay that demonstrates and commits allergen optimizer v2 results.

## Implementation contract
Feature-gate the overlay; use scheduler_runs as the dry-run persistence model; compare v1 vs v2 without writing live schedule until commit.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement v2 allergen sequencing overlay with preview dry-run, KPI comparison, commit/discard, and sequence table columns.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_sequencing. Overlays 04-Planning sequencing only when planning.allergen_optimizer.v2.enabled is true; dry-runs persist as scheduler_runs run_type=dry_run status=preview.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Base sequencing route/heuristic and WO sequence read model.

acceptance_criteria: Given v2 flag is on, then v2 banner, KPI cards, preview table and commit/discard actions match pext_sequencing parity.
Given Preview Sequence runs, then a scheduler_runs dry_run preview row is created with 24h expiry metadata and no approved assignments are mutated.
Given Commit Preview runs, then draft assignments are created and outbox sequencing.preview.committed emits.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED action tests for dry-run/no-commit/commit; RTL prototype parity.
Run pnpm --filter web test scheduler/SequencingV2Overlay sequencing-actions.
risk_red_lines: Do not mutate approved schedule during preview.
Do not duplicate 04-Planning base heuristic ownership.
Do not ignore BLOCKED/segregation_required matrix cells.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/sequencing-screens.jsx:3-179` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
